record.field: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="42" fill="#1f6f4a"/> <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="26" fill="#fff"/> <text x="50" y="58" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif" font-size="22" font-weight="800" fill="#1f6f4a">B</text> </svg>

<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <!-- microphone head --> <ellipse cx="50" cy="36" rx="20" ry="24" fill="#2b2b2b"/> <ellipse cx="50" cy="36" rx="14" ry="18" fill="#555"/> <!-- grille lines --> <line x1="42" y1="22" x2="42" y2="50" stroke="#aaa" stroke-width="1"/> <line x1="50" y1="18" x2="50" y2="54" stroke="#aaa" stroke-width="1"/> <line x1="58" y1="22" x2="58" y2="50" stroke="#aaa" stroke-width="1"/> <line x1="36" y1="36" x2="64" y2="36" stroke="#aaa" stroke-width="1"/> <!-- stem --> <rect x="46" y="58" width="8" height="18" fill="#2b2b2b"/> <!-- base --> <rect x="32" y="74" width="36" height="6" rx="2" fill="#2b2b2b"/> </svg>
<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <text x="50" y="78" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Georgia,serif" font-size="80" fill="#6f1d77">𝄞</text> </svg>

<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M30 80 L30 50 Q50 30 70 50 L70 80 Z" fill="#1f6f4a"/> <rect x="46" y="38" width="8" height="20" fill="#fff"/> <rect x="40" y="46" width="20" height="4" fill="#fff"/> </svg>

<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <rect x="20" y="70" width="60" height="10" rx="2" fill="#7a5c00"/> <rect x="55" y="35" width="14" height="40" rx="3" transform="rotate(35 62 55)" fill="#a0522d"/> <rect x="35" y="22" width="24" height="14" rx="3" transform="rotate(35 47 29)" fill="#7a5c00"/> </svg>

<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <!-- left antler --> <path d="M40 60 L30 42 L22 46 L28 30 L18 32 L26 20 L36 30 L34 42 L44 50 Z" fill="#6f1d77" stroke="#4a1451" stroke-width="1"/> <!-- right antler --> <path d="M60 60 L70 42 L78 46 L72 30 L82 32 L74 20 L64 30 L66 42 L56 50 Z" fill="#6f1d77" stroke="#4a1451" stroke-width="1"/> <!-- deer face --> <ellipse cx="50" cy="70" rx="14" ry="18" fill="#a67c52"/> <!-- eyes --> <circle cx="45" cy="66" r="2" fill="#2b1b1b"/> <circle cx="55" cy="66" r="2" fill="#2b1b1b"/> <!-- nose --> <ellipse cx="50" cy="78" rx="3" ry="2" fill="#2b1b1b"/> </svg>
<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <text x="50" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Georgia,serif" font-size="80" fill="#b07000">♫</text> </svg>

<svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <rect x="15" y="35" width="70" height="30" rx="4" fill="#888"/> <text x="50" y="56" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="800" fill="#fff">CLOSED</text> </svg>
